title: Development of Carboxymethyl-Sagocellulose-Stabilized Fe3O4 Nanoparticles Conjugated with 5-Fluorouracil for Targeted Photothermal Therapy in Cancer Treatment
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"qshal","text":"To develop and evaluate carboxymethyl-sagocellulose-stabilized Fe3O4 nanoparticles conjugated with 5-fluorouracil (5-FU) for targeted photothermal therapy (PTT) in cancer treatment, enhancing drug delivery and therapeutic efficacy.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"n3u7s","text":"Handle all chemicals with appropriate personal protective equipment (PPE). Dispose of waste according to local regulations. Be aware of potential hazards associated with nanoparticles.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"77fyp","text":"Materials - ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"kv7li","text":"Sodium hydroxide 10 g","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"gegmc","text":"Sodium monochloroacetate 5 g","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"z22wr","text":"Sodium chlorite 5 g","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"amtyy","text":"Acetic acid 50 mL","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3whcu","text":"Ethylene glycol 40 mL","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"g3g64","text":"Ferric chloride hexahydrate 1.08 g","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"k7sng","text":"5-Fluorouracil 1 g","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fryf6","text":"EDC 0.025 g/mL in buffer A","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"yywc5","text":"Sulfo-NHS 0.025 g/mL in buffer A","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"jfrcq","text":"Phosphate buffer solution 200 mL","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bkq5k","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fuexr","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ttr9l","text":"Reagents - ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"rmy9s","text":"Sodium hydroxide","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"xxuwq","text":"5-Fluorouracil","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Dissolve 1.0 g of PSSMA, 1.08 g of FeCl3·6H2O, and 3.0 g of NaOAc in 40 mL of ethylene glycol.
Homogenize the solution and transfer it to an autoclave.
Collect the black precipitate, wash with deionized water, and dry at 30 °C overnight.
Disperse 0.60 g of Fe3O4 nanoparticles in 350 mL of ethanol and 3 mL of deionized water.
Add 4 mL of APS and stir for 12 hours under nitrogen atmosphere.
Collect the precipitate, wash with deionized water, and dry at 30 °C overnight.
Dissolve 1 g of CMSC in 200 mL of phosphate buffer (pH 7.0).
Add EDC and sulfo-NHS at a molar ratio of 0.5 relative to carboxyl groups.
Stir for 12 hours in the dark.
Add 5-FU solution and stir for an additional 12 hours.
Recover the nanoparticles using a magnet, wash, and vacuum-dry overnight.
Prepare Fe3O4-CMSC-5FU nanoparticles at various concentrations (30, 75, 175, 350 mg/mL).
Irradiate with an 808 nm laser at a power density of 600 mW/cm² for 15 minutes.
Measure temperature increase using a thermocouple.
creator: Anand Kumar Veeramachineni
